stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
An aircraft is being vectored to intercept the localiser back course approach to Runway 32 (inbound course 316°M), which is based on the back beam of the localiser for Runway 14 (inbound course 136°M). The pilots expect to experience an 8-degree left drift on final approach. Which of the HSI options in the figure below is the one that corresponds to this situation?
